findings.message: Removed email from public users payloads; email remains only on the authenticated viewer.
Unverified OIDC email claims can no longer create accounts, link identities or grant email-based admin privileges.
Verified password and Google sign-ins reuse the same stable users.id; legacy unverified emails require explicit verification.
The live site still omits Strict-Transport-Security until the local server fix is deployed.
